entity.label: Elidad
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Whom God has loved, son of Chislon, and chief of the tribe of Benjamin; one of those who were appointed to divide the Promised Land among the tribes (Num. 34:21).

nodes.description: Whom God has loved, son of Chislon, and chief of the tribe of Benjamin; one of those who were appointed to divide the Promised Land among the tribes (Num. 34:21).

verses.text: Of the tribe of Benjamin, Elidad the son of Chislon.
